uplink.description: Full station: battery, temperature, humidity, wind direction, pressure, wind speed (in-bounds synthetic values)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds payload; expected.data derived by running reference/upstream-codec.js (the Milesight channel/type TLV decoder, source of truth) and mapping its fields to the normalized vocabulary: temperature->air.temperature, humidity->air.relativeHumidity, pressure->air.pressure (hPa, atmospheric), wind_direction->wind.direction, wind_speed->wind.speed, battery(%)->batteryPercent.

uplink.description: Station with rainfall and below-zero temperature: battery, neg temp, humidity, wind direction, pressure, wind speed, rainfall total + counter
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds payload exercising the rainfall channel (0x08/0x77 -> rain.cumulative mm + rainfallCounter extra) and a negative (two's-complement) air.temperature. expected.data derived by running reference/upstream-codec.js and mapping its fields to the vocabulary.
Synthetic error case: upstream silently returns an empty object for unknown channels; our normalized codec reports an error instead. Channel 0x09/type 0x63 is not part of the WTS305 wire format.
